title: Tell Me My Items
description: Adds a slash command to export information about the game
body:
Allows easy exporting of item data, mainly to be used with a VSCode addon.

![](https://i.imgur.com/nNdOes9.gif "")

Adds a command `/tmmiexport` that will create a folder `tmmi` inside the game folder, which will contain json for all the items in the game.

Get the VSCode extension here:

https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=TeamDman.tell-me-my-items

You must configure the extension preferences to point to the path of the json file.

You must run the `TMMI: reload` command or enable autoload for suggestions to appear.

Currently associated with zenscript, javascript, and SFML files.
